name: The Bridge Social Café
current_booking_tool: HallMaster (room scheduling only) + manual email enquiry (cafe@thebridge-uk.org) + phone. No DesignMyNight/SevenRooms/Tagvenue. Quote + deposit handled manually.
pain_points: Hire quotes manual via email; HallMaster covers room scheduling but not enquiry intake or deposit — no online quote/deposit flow.
fit_reason: Explicit café-by-day / event-space-by-night-and-weekends dead-time model, manual email quoting, no integrated deposit/enquiry — Rezerver sweet spot.
notes: Charity-run café (women's wellbeing), 81 Southwark Bridge Road SE1 0NQ. Events/yr estimated. TEXTBOOK dead-time hire ICP.

name: The Black Penny
current_booking_tool: Own website private-hire enquiry form (location dropdown) + per-location email + phone; also listed on Tagvenue. No SevenRooms/DesignMyNight for hire intake.
pain_points: Private-hire enquiries fragmented across own form + 3 location inboxes + Tagvenue; no online availability/deposit, manual back-and-forth.
fit_reason: Active multi-site private hire with fragmented manual enquiry intake and no integrated availability/deposit; slightly lower as hire skews to daytime trading.
notes: 3 sites (Covent Garden, Sloane Square, South Bank). Other emails: sloanesquare@/southbank@theblackpenny.com. CG min spend GBP180-600.

name: Apples & Pears Bar
venue_type: cocktail bar / event bar (2 floors + basement speakeasy)
current_booking_tool: Manual — phone + email (enquiries@/bookings@applesandpearsbar.com), handled by a named coordinator (Kim). Listed on DesignMyNight, Tagvenue, HeadBox, Hire Space as lead-gen only (route back to venue). No own booking/deposit form, no SevenRooms/Collins/ResDiary.
pain_points: Manual enquiry handling by one person (Kim, Mon-Fri 10-6) is a bottleneck; reliant on multiple aggregators; no self-serve enquiry/deposit form; min-spend quoted ad hoc.
fit_reason: Active year-round private-hire business on manual email/phone with no booking/deposit system — exactly Rezerver's enquiry-management + deposit target.
notes: 26 Osborn Street E1 6TD (Brick Lane/Aldgate East). Independent, no-hire-fee/min-spend model. Named contact (Kim) = warm entry. Events/yr estimated.

name: The Lordship Pub
current_booking_tool: OpenTable for standard table reservations; private hire / function-room enquiries handled manually by email (info@) + phone, 24h reply promise. No event booking/deposit platform.
pain_points: Function-room enquiries via a generic inbox; no online availability or deposit for the private room; hire and table flows split across email + OpenTable.
fit_reason: Dedicated function room sold via manual email enquiry, no deposit/availability system — solid fit; lower for smaller scale + no named contact.
notes: 211 Lordship Lane, East Dulwich SE22 8HA. Independent gastropub. Events/yr estimated.

name: The Whiskey Jar
venue_type: whisky bar / restaurant + hireable basement event space
current_booking_tool: Manual — own email (events@thewhiskeyjar.com) + phone; NO online form, NO booking software. Listed on Tagvenue, HeadBox, Hire Space, VenueScanner, DesignMyNight (inbound leads only), handled via email/phone.
pain_points: Enquiries scattered across own inbox + 5+ marketplaces; no central form, no deposit-taking, no pipeline — manual double-handling.
fit_reason: Fully manual email/phone hire across many marketplaces, no form or deposit tooling — exactly the fragmented workflow Rezerver consolidates.
notes: 14 Tariff Street, Northern Quarter. Basement private bar + AV. Events/yr estimated; seated capacity not published.

name: The Castlefield Rooms
venue_type: dedicated private event venue (3 boutique rooms)
current_booking_tool: Manual — website enquiry form + sales@thecastlefieldrooms.com + phone; no dedicated event-booking software visible. Also on Hire Space, Function Fixers, Conferences-UK (lead sources).
pain_points: Sales via generic form/email/phone, no CRM; deposits + enquiry tracking likely manual; leads from multiple aggregators reconciled by hand.
fit_reason: High-volume dedicated events venue running enquiries via basic form/email/phone with no booking-and-deposit platform — strong fit for enquiry management + deposits.
notes: 18-20 Castle St M3 4LZ, Castlefield (above Dukes 92). In-house catering. Rooms: Gallery, Brindley, Merchant. Events/yr estimated.

name: Leith Depot
venue_type: independent bar, restaurant & grassroots live-music venue
current_booking_tool: Manual — phone + personal Gmail (depotvenue@gmail.com) + a basic web enquiry form. No third-party platform. No availability calendar, no deposit-taking.
pain_points: Hire fee 'on request' / negotiable case-by-case; phone + Gmail + basic form; no online availability, no deposit, manual back-and-forth on layout/numbers.
fit_reason: Fully manual enquiry (phone/Gmail/basic form), active hire with negotiable fees, no booking/deposit system — exactly the workflow Rezerver replaces.
notes: Independent, refurbished 2023. Uses a PERSONAL Gmail for all hire enquiries (like HU Nagyvillam pattern). Events/yr estimated.

name: Tobacco Factory Café Bar
venue_type: independent café bar & multi-space arts/events venue (5 spaces)
current_booking_tool: Manual email — venues@tobaccofactory.com (events) / bookings@tobaccofactory.com (Snug) + phone. No DesignMyNight/Collins/SevenRooms/Tagvenue booking system on hire page.
pain_points: All hire enquiries to email/phone with separate addresses per space; no online booking/availability or deposit; manual coordination across 5 spaces.
fit_reason: Active multi-space hire entirely via email/phone with no online booking or deposit, but larger/more structured than a single-room indie.
notes: Southville landmark (former cigarette factory). 5 spaces: Snug, Studio, Loft, Tent, Terrace. Events/yr estimated.

name: Cherry Reds Cafe & Bar
venue_type: independent café bar (city centre) + 2 hireable rooms
current_booking_tool: Skedda self-serve online booking/availability calendar (cherryreds.skedda.com, card required) + email (people@cherryreds.com). Phone listed but out of order. No SevenRooms/DesignMyNight/ResDiary — generic space-scheduler, not hospitality-specific.
pain_points: Phone out of order (email-only funnel); Skedda is a generic room-scheduler not built for hospitality hire (min-spend/food finalised offline, deposits ad-hoc/seasonal); no integrated deposit/enquiry flow.
fit_reason: Active multi-room private hire on manual email + a generic non-hospitality tool (Skedda) with ad-hoc deposits — exactly the manual workflow Rezerver replaces.
notes: Est. 2010. Day café + evening events + jazz (@upstairsatcherryreds). Whole-floor hire ~120. Phone status to re-verify. Events/yr estimated.

name: The Canary (Canary Bar)
venue_type: independent neighbourhood bar & kitchen (shipping containers, Leeds Dock)
current_booking_tool: Own website enquiry form + Calendly calendar link + email (hello@canarybar.co.uk). No hospitality booking platform (no SevenRooms/ResDiary/DesignMyNight) — manual via form/Calendly/email.
pain_points: Enquiries split across web form + Calendly + shared inbox (no single pipeline); no deposit mechanism; entertainment add-ons coordinated manually.
fit_reason: Dedicated private space (The Nest) with hire driven by form + Calendly + email and no deposit/enquiry-management — the manual stack Rezerver targets.
notes: Leeds Dock waterside. Upstairs 'The Nest' (40 seated/60 standing). Sister venue Fearns for larger events. No phone published. Events/yr estimated.
